dashboard_description: Token usage, costs, tool activity, and errors across all AI coding sessions captured by the OTEL stack.

cards.name: Total cost (USD)
cards.description: Sum of claude_code.cost.usage across all sessions, models, and users.
cards.sql: SELECT round(sum(Value), 2) AS total_cost_usd FROM observability.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'claude_code.cost.usage'

cards.name: Total tokens
cards.description: Sum of all token types (input + output + cacheRead + cacheCreation).
cards.sql: SELECT toUInt64(sum(Value)) AS total_tokens FROM observability.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'claude_code.token.usage'

cards.name: Active users
cards.description: Distinct user emails that emitted at least one cost event.
cards.sql: SELECT uniqExact(Attributes['user.email']) AS active_users FROM observability.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'claude_code.cost.usage'

cards.name: Sessions
cards.sql: SELECT uniqExact(Attributes['session.id']) AS sessions FROM observability.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'claude_code.cost.usage'

cards.name: Cost over time (daily)
cards.sql: SELECT toDate(TimeUnix) AS day, round(sum(Value), 4) AS cost_usd FROM observability.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'claude_code.cost.usage' GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

cards.name: Cost by model
cards.sql: SELECT Attributes['model'] AS model, round(sum(Value), 4) AS cost_usd FROM observability.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'claude_code.cost.usage' GROUP BY model ORDER BY cost_usd DESC

cards.name: Cost by user (top 10)
cards.sql: SELECT Attributes['user.email'] AS user_email, round(sum(Value), 4) AS cost_usd FROM observability.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'claude_code.cost.usage' GROUP BY user_email ORDER BY cost_usd DESC LIMIT 10

cards.name: Top 20 most expensive sessions
cards.sql: SELECT Attributes['session.id'] AS session_id, Attributes['user.email'] AS user_email, round(sum(Value), 4) AS cost_usd FROM observability.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'claude_code.cost.usage' GROUP BY session_id, user_email ORDER BY cost_usd DESC LIMIT 20

cards.name: Token usage by type (per model)
cards.description: Input, output, and cache token totals split by model.
cards.sql: SELECT Attributes['model'] AS model, toUInt64(sumIf(Value, Attributes['type'] = 'input')) AS input, toUInt64(sumIf(Value, Attributes['type'] = 'output')) AS output, toUInt64(sumIf(Value, Attributes['type'] = 'cacheRead')) AS cache_read, toUInt64(sumIf(Value, Attributes['type'] = 'cacheCreation')) AS cache_creation FROM observability.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'claude_code.token.usage' GROUP BY model ORDER BY (input + output + cache_read + cache_creation) DESC

cards.name: Cache hit ratio over time
cards.description: cacheRead / (input + output + cacheRead) per day. Higher is better.
cards.sql: SELECT toDate(TimeUnix) AS day, round(sumIf(Value, Attributes['type'] = 'cacheRead') / nullIf(sumIf(Value, Attributes['type'] IN ('input','output','cacheRead')), 0), 4) AS cache_ratio FROM observability.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName = 'claude_code.token.usage' GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

cards.name: Tool calls breakdown
cards.description: Span counts grouped by SpanName for the claude-code service.
cards.sql: SELECT SpanName AS span, count() AS calls FROM observability.otel_traces WHERE ServiceName = 'claude-code' GROUP BY span ORDER BY calls DESC LIMIT 25

cards.name: Activity timeline (hourly logs)
cards.description: Number of log records per hour across all services.
cards.sql: SELECT toStartOfHour(Timestamp) AS hour, ServiceName AS service, count() AS events FROM observability.otel_logs GROUP BY hour, service ORDER BY hour

cards.name: Hook events by type and tool
cards.description: PreToolUse / PostToolUse / failure events grouped by hook event and tool.
cards.sql: SELECT LogAttributes['hook_event'] AS hook, splitByChar(':', LogAttributes['hook_name'])[2] AS tool, count() AS events FROM observability.otel_logs WHERE Body LIKE 'claude_code.hook_%' AND LogAttributes['hook_event'] != '' GROUP BY hook, tool ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 50

cards.name: Hook trace duration (avg + p95)
cards.description: Average and 95th-percentile duration (ms) for cotel hook spans and tool execution spans.
cards.sql: SELECT SpanName AS span, round(avg(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS avg_ms, round(quantile(0.95)(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS p95_ms, count() AS spans FROM observability.otel_traces WHERE SpanName LIKE 'cotel.hook.%' OR SpanName LIKE 'claude_code.tool%' GROUP BY span ORDER BY p95_ms DESC LIMIT 25

cards.name: Error rate over time (daily)
cards.description: Share of log records with severity ERROR or FATAL per day.
cards.sql: SELECT toDate(Timestamp) AS day, round(countIf(SeverityText IN ('ERROR','FATAL')) / nullIf(count(), 0), 4) AS error_rate, count() AS total_logs FROM observability.otel_logs GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
